hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *src/i18n/*) out=$(pnpm test --run src/i18n/__tests__/locales.test.ts 2>&1) || { echo "i18n ko/en 대칭 검사 실패 — locales.test.ts 확인:" >&2; printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -20 >&2; exit 2; };; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */CLAUDE.md|*/.claude/commands/*.md|*/.agents/PREAMBLE.md) out=$(node scripts/sync-agents.mjs 2>&1) || { echo "Codex 미러 생성 실패 — scripts/sync-agents.mjs 확인:" >&2; printf "%s\n" "$out" | tail -20 >&2; exit 2; };; esac
